lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: What... Oh, don't creep up on me like that... I thought you were a Ghast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go through the gate please?

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: Absolutely not! I've been given strict instructions not to let anyone through. It's just too dangerous. No one gets in without Drezels say so!

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: Oh, he's in the temple, just go back over the bridge, down the ladder and along the hallway, you can't miss him.

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: What... Oh, don't creep up on me like that... I thought you were a Ghast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go through the gate please?

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: Absolutely not! I've been given strict instructions not to let anyone through. It's just too dangerous. No one gets in without Drezels say so!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I'm doing a quest for Drezel!

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: What... Oh, don't creep up on me like that... I thought you were a Ghast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go through the gate please?

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: Yes of course my friend, you seem to be able to handle yourself with those ghasts really well.

sections.title: Overhead dialogue upon leaving the swamp through the gate

lines.speaker: Ulizius
lines.text: Very well done! Here you go!
